message:
fix(time): refine coalescing saturation test to use near-max deadline

Update coalescing_window_boundary_saturates_at_time_max test to start
the wheel near Time::MAX (u64::MAX - 2ms) and register a timer at
u64::MAX - 500us rather than using exact Time::MAX. This avoids
forcing a full-range wheel advance from time zero and more accurately
exercises the saturating arithmetic in the coalescing boundary
calculation.

Also sync .beads/issues.jsonl with latest issue tracker state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
